title: 50 Sheets - Large Coloured Tissue Paper 20 x 30 inches (500x750mm) | Acid Free Art and Craft Wrapping Paper | Gift Wrapping Decorative Soft Tissue Sheets (Dark Green)
features: Large Coloured Tissue Paper Size: 20 x 30 inches (500x750mm) | Qty: 50 Sheets
Wide Range of Colors: Please choose your required color. This tissue paper comes in a variety of vibrant and muted colors, allowing for creative expression and customization in various projects.
Translucent Texture: The delicate and slightly translucent nature of tissue paper adds a unique visual appeal when layered, creating depth and interesting effects in artwork.
DIY and Crafting: It's popular for DIY and crafting enthusiasts, and it's a great material for both beginners and experienced artists.
Acid-Free Options: This acid-free tissue paper is available for projects that require preservation, as it helps prevent deterioration and discoloration over time.
Versatile: It can be used for a wide range of artistic and craft applications, from gift wrapping to collage, card-making, and more.
description: Product Description Sunrise | Acid Free Large White Tissue Paper | Features Generous Size: The large 20 x 30-inch sheets offer extensive coverage, making them ideal for wrapping gifts, protecting delicate items, and crafting projects with ease. Acid-Free & Protective: Designed to prevent yellowing and deterioration , the acid-free material ensures long-lasting quality, keeping your items safe and well-preserved. Available in Multiple Colors: Choose from a wide range of vibrant and muted colors , allowing for creative customization in gift wrapping, decorations, and craft projects. Multipurpose Use: Perfect for gift wrapping, art projects, DIY crafts, and delicate item protection , this tissue paper adds a touch of elegance and functionality to any occasion. White Tissue Paper for Wrapping Enhance your gifting and crafting experience with our premium acid-free tissue paper ! Measuring 20 x 30 inches , these large, soft, and durable sheets are perfect for wrapping gifts, protecting delicate items, and DIY craft projects . Available in a variety of vibrant and muted colors , they add a touch of elegance to any occasion. The acid-free composition ensures long-lasting quality , preventing yellowing or damage over time. Whether you're a business, artist, or gift-wrapping enthusiast, these versatile, delicate and safe sheets are a must-have for flawless presentation and protection . Elevate your packaging— wrap, protect, and impress today!
